page_metadata.biotools__summary: Java library to analyze next generation sequencing data (e.g. data generated by Illumina's mRNAseq method) and especially perform expression profiling in organisms where no well-annotated reference genome exists.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Java library to analyze next generation sequencing data (e.g. data generated by Illumina's mRNAseq method) and especially perform expression profiling in organisms where no well-annotated reference genome exists.
